item.title: RIP, President Jimmy Carter by: Mike Luckovich of the The Atlanta Journal-Constitution
item.description:
He led by example.
He never expected anything in return.
He was, and will always be remembered as, a great human being.
item.dc:creator: AtariJaguar64Bit

item.title: I guess I'll go get a bag and munch away in his memory.
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.title: But eggs will be cheaper.
item.description: Good lord people in my country are stupid. They think a Billionaire is gonna give them anything? Lol, it’s like they didn’t even watch Scrooge Mcduck growing up. Let me break this down for you. Trump is there to distract; that’s it. He’s a puppet and while we’re all freaking out about the stupid shit he says…we get screwed by laws that affect us that we don’t even realize. There are probably hundreds of examples of this…please share below. I’ll kick things off and share a video about how we’ve pretty much lost any power to fight corporations in court. Let’s learn about arbitration and how you’ve given away your ability to sue a company even though they’ve obviously stepped over a line or should be held responsible for something. Buckle up buttercup. https://youtu.be/sVe_60Pe3yM?si=3exVrD302Qh8pfEF
item.dc:creator: pixelpatron

item.title: Insurance companies hate this one simple trick
item.description: I do not condone violence. However, I do agree with the implementation of violence when it is appropriate. It was very appropriate in this instance. FP Edit: Thanks for the conversation spurred by this! Want to help a disabled veteran? https://www.gofundme.com/f/Help-crush-ptsd https://linktr.ee/GridSquares Thanks for any considerations
item.dc:creator: VeteranGridSquares

item.title: Me, doing my part for team acorn
item.dc:creator: avoidarama

item.title: A wholesome Sunday dump with cute animals and appreciation for my fav posters on here <3
item.description:
I hope this post can be a little oasis between all the craziness :)
Just wanna mention my fav posters
Im not posting a lot of memes, but Im trying!
Love the THT community <3
My poor heart
This man knows!
Never fails to make me laugh <3
He looks like he will break your heart, but it will be worth it, damnit!
Let it all out little one <3
I blame all of you for the countless hours going down the drain :'D
Cat tax <3 Thank you for all the laughs (and sometimes wholesome cries) in 2024. I hope Imgur wont forget that its you, us, who make this site a good place to hang out. See you next year :)
item.dc:creator: walpurrga

item.title: Results May Vary. Survivors Encouraged to Scream About Christ During Yuletide

item.title: Team Acorn is losing. Awaken the seven servers and the controller
item.description: The servers are the 7 Chaos. Chaos is power... Power enriched by the heart. The controller is the one that unifies the Chaos. Took way too long to balance the damn things end to end.
